tda_robustness_audit.status: DONE — closes R18 must-fix #8 with POSITIVE verdict
tda_robustness_audit.verdict: vein_persH1_total robust under Holm-Bonferroni 18-feature TDA panel AND 1000-iter bootstrap (100% sign-stable). LOO d range tight [-1.335, -1.127]. Effect direction reproducibly negative — PH veins lose H1-loop topology persistence. Two additional TDA features Holm-pass (vein_persH0_total, artery_persH0_total). Closes R18 must-fix #8.

r17_artifact_audit.verdict: n_terminals=0 across 282/282 cases for all 3 structures (degree-counting bug); lap_eig0 numerical zero (~1e-18) for artery+vein; edges/branches ratio ~4.0 (multi-voxel-per-branch; not a bug, just different granularity). Flagship findings (artery_len_p25, artery_len_p50, artery_tort_p10, vein_len_p25) are NOT in artifact set. paren_std_HU + vein_persH1_total live in different feature tables, not affected. R18 must-fix #7 closed.

ddpm_eval.status: DONE — closes R18 must-fix #1 with HONEST NEGATIVE
ddpm_eval.interpretation: DDPM trained on plain-scan nonPH (R19 new100); inference on legacy CTPA cohort. PH cases reconstruct BETTER than nonPH (lower NLL) — opposite direction of expected anomaly detection. Result is dominated by protocol shift (training-plain-scan vs test-CTPA), not by PH-vs-nonPH biology. Honest negative: this DDPM does NOT generalize as a label-free PH detector across protocols. R18 must-fix #1 closed.

history.r24_summary: Wave-1+2+3 all complete. R24.0 cohort lock (290 cases SHA256 1e7d20b2). R24.A pseudotime within-contrast ρ_mPAP=+0.213 FAIL gate ρ≥0.35 (honest neg). R24.B 0/78 features pass ΔAIC≥10 (mechanistically informative — continuous remodeling not threshold). R24.D artery onset earliest along pseudotime (cross-sectional ordering). R24.E nomogram exploratory: 10× repeated 5-fold Lasso, DCA at 4 prevalence anchors, EXPLORATORY stamp. R24.F 1/72 Holm-sig (artery_len_p75 ρ=-0.333), top-13 all NEGATIVE direction. R24.G SSL d=32 ρ=+0.252 OOF, PCA-32 ρ=+0.181, Δ=+0.071 PASS SSL-vs-PCA gate, FAIL ρ≥0.50. R24.X CRITICAL FALSIFICATION: SSL severity PASSES 99th-pct null (0.252 > 0.239), pseudotime FAILS (0.213 < 0.256) — SSL is genuine signal beyond fold-stratified noise. R24.Y overlay regen: 12/16 cases rendered (PH+contrast nonPH all OK), 4 plain-scan blank (CT only on remote). 9 figures all in outputs/figures/fig_r24*.png; 5-piece sync committed each sub-round; README atlas section added with Chinese explanations.

history.reviewer_notes_for_memory: R17 9.2/10 (up from R16 9.0). Best new finding: native per-structure cache_tri_v2 morphometrics reveal strong within-contrast artery/vein edge-distribution phenotype. **artery_tort_p10 d=-1.42 p_holm=2.6e-7** (LARGE), artery_len_p25/p50/p10 d≈-1.22 to -1.25, vein_len_p25 d=-1.19. This is the strongest topology-specific finding to date and cleaner for the user's vascular-remodeling hypothesis than R16 paren_std_HU. NOT yet 9.5 because: nonPH-contrast n=27, scanner sensitivity untested, extraction has topology artifacts (n_terminals=0 bug, Laplacian eig0 numerical zero, edge_attr [::2] assumption needs verification). Airway 0/44 sig is WEAK negative not proof of vessel-only phenotype (airway-LR AUC=0.797 paradoxical due to different N). Mechanistic wording: 'segment-length+low-tort percentile downshift consistent with remodeling/pruning' NOT 'proven dropout' (artery total_len_mm not lower; n_nodes/n_edges not reduced). R18 must do same-case paired AUCs + covariate/scanner adjustment + extraction audit + embedding-level enlarged deconfounding.

experiments: R16.A independent seg QC on new100: 79/100 lung masks >8.5L (median 10.8L; normal 1.5-8.5L). Confirms reviewer-flagged Simple_AV_seg domain-transfer concern (CTPA-trained lung.pth oversegments on plain-scan).

R16.B Holm-Bonferroni endotype: 9/14 features survive at α=0.05. paren_std_HU LARGEST effect d=+1.10 [+0.80, +1.48] p_holm=1.7e-7; whole_std_HU d=+0.62; paren_mean_HU d=+0.66; lung_vol_mL d=-0.64; apical_basal_LAA950_gradient d=-0.50; paren_LAA_856_frac d=-0.62; vessel_airway_over_lung d=-0.32; artery_vol_mL d=+0.27. NS: paren_LAA_950_frac, paren_LAA_910_frac, vein_vol_mL, basal/apical_LAA_950_frac.
R16.C lung-mask repair (HU<-300 + top-2-CC filter): 100/100 cases, median lung vol 10839 mL → 7678 mL (26% drop).

R16.D repaired enlarged probe: within-nonPH protocol LR 0.908 → 0.958 [0.924, 0.983] (Δ=+0.05) — repair INCREASES protocol decodability, R15.G was CONSERVATIVE not inflated. Within-contrast disease 0.847 → 0.816 [0.706, 0.909] (Δ=-0.031) — 3pt of signal lived in over-mask soft-tissue. Endotype replicates IDENTICALLY (paren_std_HU still LARGEST p=1.2e-8).

R17 schema discovery: tri_structure/cache_tri_v2/<case_id>_tri.pkl has native {artery: Data, vein: Data, airway: Data} keys; cache_v2_tri_flat is merged via _remote_v2_flat_convert.py (vein offset by n_artery, structure-id is node-index range)
Multi-task-per-GPU policy adopted (user 2026-04-25): 2-3 GCN/GPU, 2 Simple_AV_seg/GPU, 1 diffusion/GPU exclusive, 24-core remote CPU pool

history.reviewer_notes_for_memory: R16 9.0/10 (up from R15 8.8). Strongest advance: independent detection + repair of Simple_AV_seg plain-scan oversegmentation (median 10.8L→7.7L), AND the repaired rerun falsified the easy objection that R15.G protocol AUC was overmask artifact. Protocol leakage is STRONGER after repair: LR 0.958 [0.924, 0.983] within nonPH n=151. Repaired within-contrast disease 0.816 [0.706, 0.909] is the cleaner estimate (replaces 0.847). paren_std_HU is currently best single endotype finding (d=+1.10 [+0.80,+1.48], Holm p=1.7e-7), repaired-replicated, within-contrast — higher quality than R14 cluster claims but not final (n=27 nonPH-contrast small; HU heterogeneity scanner-sensitive). 5/14 NS features support 'distribution/heterogeneity not total LAA-950 burden' narrative cautiously. R17 must move from scalar repaired probes to embedding-level enlarged deconfounding + anatomical mask validation + per-structure morphometrics.

experiments: R14.E multi-seed CORAL probe (R13_coral_probe.py, expanded): 4 λ × 3 seeds = 12 CORAL + 2 MMD configs harvested. CORAL λ=1 corrected n=68 LR per-seed [0.791, 0.714, 0.624], mean 0.71 ± 0.08; disease AUC 0.933 ± 0.001 across all λ. CORAL beats corrected-GRL R11 0.80 floor by 0.10 AUC with disease preserved. MMD λ=5 LR=0.644 but disease drops to 0.85.

R14.B multi-structure phenotype clustering (R14_multistruct_phenotype_clustering.py): UMAP+KMeans on 66-D feature vector (50 graph + 16 lung) over 226 cases. Within-contrast n=184: 3 PH endotypes — C0 transition (69%PH; vessel-diameter+emphysema), C1 PH-arterial-rich (93%PH; high node/edge+artery vol), C2 PH-dense-lung (93%PH; small lung vol+high HU+low LAA-856).

R14.D lung-only vs graph-only disease ablation (R14_lung_only_vs_graph_only_ablation.py): within-contrast n=184 — graph_only 0.782 [0.676, 0.877], lung_only 0.844 [0.754, 0.917], graph+lung 0.867 [0.796, 0.930]. LUNG DOMINATES; graph adds +0.085 AUC complementary signal. Per-graph-substring: x1 (diameter) 0.807, e0 0.602.

NOT a confirmed deconfounding victory: n=68, 3 seeds, LR range 0.624-0.791, MLP mean 0.752, no hierarchical CI, no paired GRL test. MMD λ=5 LR=0.644 but disease 0.85 (unacceptable). history.reviewer_notes_for_memory: R11 has the right meta-science (multi-seed + bootstrap + MLP probe) but the asserted bug-fix code wasn't in the local repo at review time — reviewer caught this and downgraded to 5.0. The fix script is now committed (run_sprint6_v2_grl_fix.py). Substantive finding: even with corrected GRL + nonPH-only adversary + multi-seed, best protocol AUC is 0.80 (target 0.60). MLP probe shows 0.88 (non-linear leakage worse). Disease drops 0.73→0.64 at high λ. The GRL path is exhausted on n=80 within-nonPH stratum. Path forward requires either (a) more plain-scan nonPH data (100 new cases queued for ingestion), (b) full 282 cohort with degraded graphs, or (c) different deconfounding objective (CORAL/MMD/IRM).

OBJECTIVE MISMATCH: adversary trained on full cohort where PH≈contrast. Should be trained on nonPH-only OR class-conditional, to match the within-nonPH evaluation target.

user_raised_target_note: 2026-04-26 user request: 9.6 closed manuscript-scope but did NOT prove the 4 core science questions (血管演化轨迹 + 肺实质气道辅助 + 早期PH肺血管改变 + 系统化定量+纵向). Target raised to 9.9. R24+ must address these 4 questions specifically with new evidence: pseudotime trajectory model, early-PH changepoint analysis, multi-structure cross-attention visualization, pseudo-longitudinal compensation for missing repeated scans, and a validated risk nomogram.
